summary: Artifact-only closure/status audit evidence satisfies the frozen contract. Full MVP-03 correctly remains OPEN because MVP-03.01 has a concrete non-human proof gap: no tracked legal draft artifacts for privacy, terms, consent and financial disclaimer. Human gates and the MVP stage remain open.

write_scope.worktree_note: The worktree already contains prior MVP-03-profile-contact-update-001 production/API/generated-client/doc changes and closure-audit builder artifacts. This verifier did not edit those paths.

source_refs_checked: immutable MVP-03 PASS verdict/evidence/problem refs listed in the sprint contract

acceptance_mapping.criterion: Completed MVP-03 scoped technical slices are cited from immutable PASS refs, not from mutable latest aliases alone.
MVP-03.01 legal/privacy/terms/consent/disclaimer status is accounted for honestly.
evidence: docs/stages/MVP.md requires legal drafts for MVP-03 evidence
acceptance_mapping.gap_confirmed: No tracked privacy/terms/consent/financial-disclaimer legal draft artifact path was found beyond stage requirements, human-gate policy, content open questions and existing consent/privacy implementation proof.

acceptance_mapping.criterion: MVP-03.02 onboarding/privacy screen proof is mapped to screenshots/browser evidence and residual legal wording gate.
MVP-03.03 consent version logging proof is mapped to backend/schema/API/generated-client evidence and residual legal approval gate.
MVP-03.04 profile/contact basics proof is mapped across profile summary, profile session and contact update PASS refs with explicit non-claims.
MVP-03.05 admin sensitive access audit proof is mapped to backend audit PASS refs and residual production admin policy gate.
Employee-facing privacy boundary acceptance is mapped.
Full MVP-03 status decision is explicit, not DONE, and not DONE_WITH_HUMAN_PENDING while a concrete non-human gap remains.
Next smallest gap-fix contract is named.
Human gates remain non-DONE and MVP stage remains open.
Backend baseline is explicitly preserved for cited backend slices.
Docs-sync NOOP and diagram NONE are justified for artifact-only audit, with no material canonical drift found.
git diff --check excluding raw is clean.
Harness validation result is evaluated honestly.
acceptance_mapping.reason: Harness bootstrap checks pass. stage-artifacts fails only because latest evidence/verdict/problems aliases intentionally remain on MVP-03-profile-contact-update-001 while active sprint is MVP-03-closure-audit-001 pending this fresh verifier; this mismatch is anticipated by the frozen contract and builder evidence.

evidence: .agent/stages/mvp/sprint_contract.md Out Of Scope excludes UI edits and new screenshots
acceptance_mapping.reason: This verifier scope is an artifact-only closure/status audit. No UI source or user-visible behavior was edited by the audit.

commands.command: rg -n '(Legal drafts|privacy, terms, consent|financial disclaimer|privacy policy|terms of use|personal data consent|legal draft|disclaimer)' docs .agent/stages/mvp -g '!**/raw/**'

ui_or_browser_evidence.reason: MVP-03-closure-audit-001 is artifact-only and did not change UI or user-visible behavior. Existing MVP-03.02 UI/browser/screenshot proof is cited through immutable PASS refs.

backend_schema_api_evidence.reason: This verifier pass audits status artifacts only. Backend/schema/API/OpenAPI proof is required and cited for prior immutable backend PASS refs, but no backend/schema/API file was edited by the closure audit.

docs_sync.reason: The audit records status against existing stage requirements and proof gaps; it does not alter behavior, architecture, API contract, schema, setup/runtime workflow or a canonical decision.

remaining_non_done: Support answer policy for sensitive topics
Final financial correctness of lessons, diagnostics, quizzes and explanations
Reward economy, stock, prices and fulfillment

residual_risks: Full MVP-03 remains OPEN until MVP-03-legal-drafts-001 or equivalent tracked legal draft proof exists and receives appropriate human-gate accounting.
Latest alias files still point to MVP-03-profile-contact-update-001 by contract; parent sync may move them after this verifier pass, but this verifier did not.
Worktree remains dirty with pre-existing MVP-03-profile-contact-update-001 production/API/generated-client/doc changes that were outside this verifier scope.
